Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Baron Miller for Severin Rizzo.

Mr. Miller addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with regard to the accounting not beginning with the correct amount, the social security receipts being provided in lump sums, and not having names and addresses of the contingent beneficiaries. The Seventh and Final Report of Co-Trustees and Waiver of Account was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Baron Miller to appear on April 1, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the 5th Account has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

March 6, 2014: The accounting petition was e-filed on March 4, 2014. The order to appear will not be issued. The status hearing is now off calendar.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Baron Miller for Petitioner.

Mr. Miller addressed the issue of the Paralegal's fees. The Court approved the accounting as submitted (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
